evidence.text: - people at bcg you get to work with incredibly smart people who are generally kind and caring it's a high paced environment where you learn every day - salary high pay which increases every year base bonus - benefits bcg is best-in-class in terms of benefits to employees great health insurance gender neutral 14 weeks parental leave and so much more gym classes mental health etc - culture inclusive culture work hard...
good benefits great insurance competitive compensation

innovative and ever-changing environment that encourages entrepreneurialism smartest kindest people best-in-class benefits from no premium healthcare to advice on navigating medicare for loved ones and from mental health support to meditation guidance doctors offices regularly say after calling my insurance for co-pay information you have the best insurance i've ever seen
salary bonus insurance benefits pto and holidays off

-bcg truly cares about their support staff -there are constant l d opportunities -we're given virtually the same benefits as consultants which has not been my experienc at past companies -the chicago office always has awesome events planned each week -lunch in chicago tuesday-thursday -best healthcare benefits i've ever had including many discounts to healthclubs and a yearly stipend -they truly mean it when they sa...

as someone who has been with boston consulting group bcg in dallas for well over a decade and has had the privilege of working with colleagues and clients across the globe i can confidently say that bcg is an exceptional place to build a career throughout my journey i ve experienced firsthand the unique culture growth and innovation that make bcg stand out both as a company and as a place to work one of the things i...

unparalleled growth environment bcg isn t just a job it s an mba phd and leadership bootcamp rolled into one every project stretches you supportive collegial culture despite the intensity the people are what make it worth it brilliant minds zero arrogance with the occasional exception collaboration is real top-tier compensation pay benefits and perks are among the best in the industry and they match the expectations...

eputation and prestige bcg is considered one of the top-tier consulting firms globally working with bcg can enhance your professional reputation and open doors to various opportunities in the future learning opportunities bcg offers a steep learning curve you will have the chance to work on challenging projects with some of the brightest minds in the industry the exposure to diverse business problems can contribute...

exceptional learning and development opportunities from day one exposure to diverse industries and challenging high-impact projects strong mentorship and coaching culture with access to brilliant colleagues clear career path and opportunities for rapid professional growth strong sense of community and culture of excellence leadership that genuinely invests in people and values feedback inclusive diverse and global e...

a incredible amount of responsibility at a young tenure i started at bcg right out of undergrad and am now leading teams and projects it has been an incredible journey b mentorship and development i can name at least 3 mentors that i have had at bcg for the past 3 years who i know have my back will support me and have helped me develop into a strong team leader in this project leader role i am excited for my opportu...

impactful work projects are high stakes and often shape the strategy of leading companies you see tangible outcomes and influence at the c-suite level colleagues you work with highly motivated intelligent people who bring diverse perspectives collaboration is emphasized and people are willing to help across cases and geographies learning and growth bcg invests heavily in training and development there are formal pro...

mission-driven culture bcg genuinely lives its values guiding every business decision with integrity and purpose this mission-driven approach fosters a collaborative and inspiring work environment impactful work working with the best companies to solve their toughest problems provides a sense of accomplishment and pride the projects are challenging yet rewarding allowing you to make a significant impact authenticity...

bcg has a top-tier culture of a entrepreneurship - if someone has an idea to improve the environment they are encouraged to do so and provided nearly whatever support is required b collaboration - the partnership structure promotes collaboration and people development such that the apprenticeship model is highly supportive and the firm brings the 'best of' to all client engagements read breeding ground for learning...

what stands out most about bcg is the genuine culture of care and respect people here truly value one another as individuals and that human connection consistently comes before work responsibilities i ve seen time and again how colleagues going through personal hardships receive unconditional support from the firm and it leaves them both amazed and deeply grateful the environment is filled with people who are not on...

i've been with bcg for 2 years as an admin and i continue to be impressed with how well this company treats their employees my role has flexibility the execs i support are incredibly dedicated to my growth and i've learned a ton of skills along the way the benefits are top tier i wfh 2 days a week in the office 3 days a week the office is amazing lunch paid for snacks unlimited drinks comfortable and a great culture...

after nearly a decade at bcg i can honestly say this is a place that continues to feel special what stands out most are the people colleagues who are not only incredibly talented but who also care deeply about each other s success and well-being i ve never worked in an environment where i ve felt so consistently supported both personally and professionally in my role as an executive assistant i ve found the work-lif...

i ve been with bcg for over three years and the experience has been nothing short of phenomenal the firm truly invests in its people providing unparalleled opportunities for growth both professionally and personally the work culture at bcg is collaborative innovative and dynamic you are constantly challenged but in a way that inspires you to bring your best every day the leadership team is approachable and genuinely...

bcg is truly committed to your personal and professional growth the learning opportunities are endless whether through formal training or by working on impactful projects the culture here is one of the best i've seen you re surrounded by smart collaborative and motivated people who push you to be your best but also have your back when things get tough there's also a strong focus on innovation bcg has done a great jo...

lots of reasons 1 meaningful work with global impact at bcg you have the opportunity to work on high-impact projects that contribute to solving significant challenges across industries and regions the firm s commitment to climate sustainability and societal issues is truly commendable 2 collaborative and inclusive culture the people at bcg are smart and driven but also genuinely supportive that is hard to come by th...

working with a global team of individuals who are motivated and excited about what they're working on creates a great work environment hybrid office environment allows for work-life balance and there are great benefits and flexibility bcg really cares about inclusion and investing in their employees there is a lot of opportunity for career growth

bcg is the consulting firm that most values intellectual integrity diversity of thought and creativity and that means the people who work together are some of the most energizing and interesting people you will get to work with the culture is collaborative - it is much more of a 'lift-people up together' culture than it is a 'compete-against each other' culture it operates with integrity and values - have heard the...
the insurance and job security is really good
smart ambitious co-workers incredible l d growth opportunities great pay and bonus provide a lot of feedback supportive environment

fantastic driven people great culture and supportive environment access to the top companies and executives in the world ability to drive impact on client's most difficult problems leading edge capabilities solving the most difficult problems that major fortune 500 companies are facing
working with some of the most highly ethical motivated intelligent people i have ever met is a huge plus the company has good values and really commits to doing the right thing for the world
- if you don't like travel you won't like it here however the staffing team listens to your preferences and tries to staff you on projects that meet your needs and situation
work life balance is not good
interesting place to work long hours
can be highly stressful at times
the workload is heavy and you don't get the same treatment or pay as cst

management is the worst i've experienced in my many years of experience company culture is more important to them and the job you do and who you support meaning if you dont go to happy hours attend internal events add more workload for fun then you are not trying hard enough to earn a promotion i've never been in such a toxi place there is no work life balance again - there is no work life balance you will work long...
i am new here so i dont see a lot of cons yet
long working hours no work life balance
no work life balance always working
toxic environment and no work-life balance

human working hours are not an option there is no effective mechanism for flagging toxic situations where the pl principal doesn t care about the well being of their team and does nothing to improve it pto is just a joke

- you have to be proactive to get on projects that fit your career growth if not you'll be stuck doing whatever the partners want you to do even if it's bad for your career - poor leadership communication i don't think leadership knows or cares to know how to build a healthy culture

mediocre team leaders and functional leaders executive directors executives hired from outside barely have relevant work experience and very close minded always blame lower level staff and never take responsibility
the promotion path and career growth are less well-defined for non-consulting staff which can be a challenge to navigate effectively
of course at times can be stressful but it comes with tremendous sense of responsibility to teams and clients to truly drive change
all the opportunities can create an unstainable workload at times but my line manager and broader stakeholders are so supportive of me trying out different working models to figure out
it's a demanding gig the promise is unmatched and there is true commitment to protecting personal norms priorities but it's not for everyone
it is not an easy job
south system didn't take kindly to staffing in other regions
i do not feel like there is anything wrong with the company

a lot of pressure and stress the money is not worth it mostly now that your job is not even secure there is no culture or incentives to help people succeed - the rule of the jungle everyone trying to protect their interests no collaboration no support to help people succeed
managing our scale as we get bigger
travel tough hours lack of boundaries
lifestyle travel intensity not predictable constant commercial pressure pipeline never sleeps
sometimes there are politics in the company
